basic_details.job_title: Govt. Nodal HSS Dudhari Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Government Nodal Higher Secondary School, Dudhari
basic_details.short_information: Government Nodal Higher Secondary School, Dudhari (Govt. Nodal HSS Dudhari) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 05 June 2026 on the official website (link provided below). A total of various vacancies have been announced through the Govt. Nodal HSS Dudhari Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate with minimum 55% marks in respective subject
qualification.details: Guest Faculty (English): Minimum 55% marks in Post Graduation in English. Preference to B.Ed (except Logic/Philosophy & Sociology) and PGDCA. Guest Faculty (Odia): Minimum 55% marks in Post Graduation in Odia. Preference to B.Ed (except Logic/Philosophy & Sociology) and PGDCA. Guest Faculty (History): Minimum 55% marks in Post Graduation in History. Preference to B.Ed (except Logic/Philosophy & Sociology) and PGDCA. Guest Faculty (Economics): Minimum 55% marks in Post Graduation in Economics. Preference to B.Ed (except Logic/Philosophy & Sociology) and PGDCA. Guest Faculty (Political Science): Minimum 55% marks in Post Graduation in Political Science. Preference to B.Ed (except Logic/Philosophy & Sociology) and PGDCA. Guest Faculty (Sociology): Minimum 55% marks in Post Graduation in Sociology. Preference to B.Ed (except Logic/Philosophy & Sociology) and PGDCA.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 400 per class subject to maximum of 50 classes per month
salary_details.details: Rs. 400 per class subject to a maximum of 50 classes per month.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Certificate Verification Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guest Faculty posts at Government Nodal Higher Secondary School, Dudhari is scheduled for 12th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a Post Graduate degree with at least 55% marks in the respective subject. Preference will be given to candidates with B.Ed and PGDCA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Guest Faculty posts is 65 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 400 per class, with a maximum limit of 50 classes per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Guest Faculty recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q7. Which subjects are recruiting Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Guest Faculty in English, Odia, History, Economics, Political Science, and Sociology.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for each of the six subjects, totaling 6 vacancies for Guest Faculty posts.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview, followed by Certificate Verification and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Government Nodal Higher Secondary School, Dudhari, Odisha, 764036.
